tools.name: get_service
tools.description: Get info about a Cloud Run service, such as its URI and whether the deploy succeeded.

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: List Cloud Run services in a given Google Cloud project and region.

tools.name: deploy_service_from_image
tools.description: Deploy a container image from Artifact Registry or Docker Hub as a Cloud Run service.

tools.name: deploy_service_from_archive
tools.description:
Deploy a Cloud Run service directly from a self-contained source code archive (.tar.gz),
skipping the container image build step for faster deployment.

The archive must include all dependencies:

tools.name: deploy_service_from_file_contents
tools.description:
Deploys a Cloud Run service directly from local source files. This method is suitable for
scripting languages like Python and Node.js, of which the source code can be embedded in the
request. This is ideal for quick tests and development feedback loops. You must include all

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "deploy_service_from_archive" references sensitive artifacts (environment variable). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "deploy_service_from_archive" is 1314 chars, far longer than this server's median (86). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.
